title: Top 10 Conversational AI Support Platforms For Startups
description: Get ready to simplify service and elevate your small business with conversational artificial intelligence (AI).

title: How AI improves email deliverability beyond send times
description: Email deliverability is cumulative, and AI email deliverability optimization works by reinforcing the sending behaviors that mailbox providers already measure over time. Mailbox providers evaluate authentication alignment, complaint rates, engagement patterns, and unsubscribe behavior across domains. In 2024, Gmail and Yahoo formalized stricter requirements for bulk senders, reinforcing a core principle: inbox placement depends on authentication, permission, and recipient behavior working together.

title: Heineken raises a glass to connecting via shared musical tastes
description: At Coachella, the brand’s Clinker band will sync data from Spotify and YouTube music and light up when similarities are found between consumers’ interests.

title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
description: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
description: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

title: Moonlake: Causal World Models should be Multimodal, Interactive, and Efficient — with Chris Manning and Fan-yun Sun
description: We cap out our World Models coverage with one of the most exciting new approaches - long running, multiplayer, interactive world models built with agents bootstrapped from game engines!

title: Proving the Power of Script: How Datasite Agents Achieved 82% Deflection and 4.8/5 CSAT
description: Datasite’s Agentforce admin used deterministic logic to achieve a 17-point jump in case deflection.

title: MCP is Alive, but Faces Challenges
description: While users of the open standard have dealt with some hiccups, they see it as an integral part of their path to AI agents.

title: Microsoft Goes Beyond LLMs With New Voice, Image Models
description: The new AI models signal a stronger push toward Microsoft-developed AI systems.

title: Neocloud Pioneer CoreWeave All In on Inference
description: After making a name for itself as a GPU-as-a-service vendor, CoreWeave is evolving -- again.

title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
description: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

title: Building Efficient RL Training for the Agentic Era
description: Introduction Reinforcement Learning from Human or AI Feedback (RLHF, RLAIF) has become the standard recipe for aligning large language models (LLMs). But as we push into the agentic era — where models call…

title: Improving quality and robustness in LLM-based text-to-speech systems
description: Low-rank adaptation, data augmentation, and chain-of-thought reasoning are among the techniques enabling accent-free polyglot outputs, improved expressiveness, and reliable synthesis.

title: Bengaluru food delivery startup Swish raises $38M, its third round in 18 months
description: Swish has more than doubled its valuation in a year as its full-stack, hyperlocal model positions ultra-fast food delivery as a high-frequency habit.

title: Optimizing LoRA target module selection for efficient fine tuning
description: Ablation study clarifies trade-offs between accuracy and efficiency when using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to fine-tune AI models.
